title: SPA Yield Lab — Protocol Card
description: A comparable, auditable due-diligence record for one protocol SPA can depend on (lending market, vault, LP venue, RWA issuer surface). Research-layer artifact; not runtime data; never read by the deterministic RiskPolicy or execution path. All TVL/revenue/activity numbers are placeholders requiring data verification until sourced with a last-verified date. Advisory scores/allocation recommendations never override RiskPolicy caps. See docs/12_protocol_card_system.md, docs/11 (Strategy Cards), docs/14 (advisory Risk Scoring v2). Formalizes due-diligence implicit in the 35 read-only adapters (spa_core/adapters ADAPTER_REGISTRY) + dfb risk overlay.

score_0_100.description: Advisory sub-score in [0,100]. Advisory only (Risk Scoring v2, docs/14); never a hard gate. Cites the dfb overlay verdict. null until computed.

date.description: Audit date (ISO-8601 or 'TBD - requires data verification').

protocol_id.description: Stable unique id, e.g. PC-0001. Never reused. Maps to the adapter key where one exists.

chains.description: Chains the protocol operates on (cross-ref adapter chains).

tvl.description: Total value locked (USD). TBD - requires data verification. Cite adapter/DeFiLlama + last-verified date.

tvl_trend.description: Direction of TVL over the trailing period.

revenue.description: Protocol revenue (annualized USD, if known). TBD until sourced.

fees.description: Protocol fees (annualized USD, if known). TBD until sourced.

user_activity.description: Qualitative user-activity note (active borrowers/depositors/unique users). TBD - requires data verification until sourced.

audits.description: Audits (firm, scope, date). Empty array = none found (state so explicitly).

exploit_history.description: Past exploits/incidents. Empty array = none known (state so explicitly).

admin_keys.description: Who controls admin/upgrade keys; multisig threshold; timelock. The most load-bearing trust field.

oracle_dependencies.description: Oracles relied on and what breaks if they fail.

governance_model.description: Governance structure (token vote, council, DAO, off-chain).

token_incentives.description: Token/points incentives inflating APY, and expected duration.

yield_sustainability.description: Whether the yield survives after incentives end.

risk_score.description: Advisory overall protocol risk (higher = riskier per docs/14). Advisory only; cites dfb overlay.

max_allocation_recommendation.description: Advisory ceiling (% of book) for this protocol. Never exceeds/overrides RiskPolicy caps (docs/06 A.1). TBD until sourced.

monitoring_frequency.description: How often the protocol must be re-checked.

emergency_triggers.description: Conditions that force de-risking/exit (TVL collapse, admin-key change, exploit, oracle failure, governance capture).
